name: Verify Apply Loan Form Load
expected: Apply Loan dialog opens with required fields
steps: Navigate to Apply Loan page
Click 'Apply for Loan' button
Assert the loan application dialog appears
Assert Loan Type, Amount, Term, and Purpose fields are present

name: Verify Maximum Loan Amount Validation
expected: Error is shown if loan amount exceeds $250,000
steps: Open Apply Loan dialog
Select Loan Type and enter amount '300000'
Fill other required fields
Click Review Application
Assert 'Loan amount cannot exceed $250,000' error is displayed

name: Verify Successful Loan Application
expected: Loan application completes successfully and appears in history
steps: Open Apply Loan dialog
Select 'Personal' loan type, amount '5000', term '24 months'
Select a disbursement account and enter purpose
Click Review Application, then Submit Application
Assert confirmation page displays 'Loan Application Received'
Navigate back to Apply Loan page
Assert the new loan appears in the 'Applied Loans' history table

name: Verify Loan History Bug Reproduction
expected: For error_user, the displayed total does not include the latest loan
steps: Login as 'error_user'
Navigate to Apply Loan page
Note the displayed Total amount
Manually sum the amounts of the visible loans in the table
Assert that the displayed Total is incorrect (missing the most recent loan amount)

name: Verify Frozen Account Block
expected: Apply Loan button is disabled for frozen accounts
steps: Login as frozen_user
Navigate to Apply Loan page
Assert 'Loan applications are disabled' banner is visible
Assert 'Apply for Loan' button is disabled

name: Verify History Pagination
expected: History table paginates correctly (5 items per page)
steps: Navigate to Apply Loan page
Scroll to Applied Loans section
Assert exactly 5 rows are visible on the first page
Click the 'Next' pagination arrow or page 2
Assert the remaining history items are displayed
